pr.title: Non-record: MLX prototyping harness with validated technique stack (val_bpb=1.9588, Mac)

output.summary: Mac MLX prototyping stack validates KV2 layers with int6 quant, FP16 tied embeddings, Muon WD, and sliding-window eval to document leaderboard techniques.
techniques: FP16 tied embeddings + Muon decoupled weight decay to shrink quant gap
Int6 per-row quantization on KV2/GQA 10-14L transformers
Sliding-window compiled eval with multi-config passes
